title: odontostemma spathulifolium
intro: Odontostemma spathulifolium, also known as Chinese toothpick or toothpick plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the reduction of fever and relief from sore throats, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Odontostemma spathulifolium are typically dried and used to make tea or decoctions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
